assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Authentication.CookieLifetime to 8 hours and Authentication.CookieSlidingExpiration to false
assertions.rationale: Sets CookieLifetime = TimeSpan.FromHours(8) and CookieSlidingExpiration = false.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to 'https://app.example.com/bff/backchannel'
The web.app client has AccessTokenLifetime set to 300 (5 minutes)
